basic_details.job_title: ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 50 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) has released a recruitment notification for Executive Officer posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible Chartered Accountants for Executive Officer positions.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 18-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 31-07-2026

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 25 Years Age will be calculated as on 30-06-2026.

salary_details.details: Pay Level: Level-10 Approximate Salary: Rs. 15.68 lakh per annum

how_to_apply: Click on the online application link.
Fill out the application form with correct details.
Submit the application form before the last date.
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 18-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 31-07-2026

content_sections.heading: ICAI Executive Officer Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India has announced vacancies for the Executive Officer post. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required professional qualification can apply for the Executive Officer post. The eligibility details are as follows: Executive Officer: Candidates must possess a Chartered Accountant (CA) qualification from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.

content_sections.heading: ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 25 Years Age will be calculated as on 30-06-2026 .

content_sections.heading: ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Pay Level: Level-10 Approximate Salary: Rs. 15.68 lakh per annum

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official ICAI website. Open the career/recruitment section. Read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete the registration process. Fill out the application form with correct details. Upload the required documents. Submit the application form before the last date. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. When was the ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 notification released?
faq.answer: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) has released the Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 notification for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name under ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name is Executive Officer.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 50 Executive Officer vacancies are available under ICAI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the starting date to apply for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process will start from 18-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 31-07-2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 25 years as on 30-06-2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification required for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Chartered Accountant (CA) qualification from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive Pay Level-10 with an approximate salary of Rs. 15.68 lakh per annum.

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates apply for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official ICAI website at https://www.icai.org/.
